briefing:
## 🌍 Top 5 Global Fintech News

- **[Fintech founder charged with fraud; AI app found to be humans in the Philippines](https://techcrunch.com/2025/04/10/fintech-founder-charged-with-fraud-after-ai-shopping-app-found-to-be-powered-by-humans-in-the-philippines/)** — *Hacker News* — A fintech founder faces fraud charges after their supposedly AI-powered shopping app was revealed to be operated by human workers in the Philippines.

- **[Americans see their savings vanish in Synapse fintech crisis](https://www.cnbc.com/2024/11/22/synapse-bankruptcy-thousands-of-americans-see-their-savings-vanish.html)** — *Hacker News* — Thousands of Americans lost access to their savings following the bankruptcy of fintech middleware company Synapse, highlighting risks in the banking-as-a-service model.

- **[Goodbye Visa and Mastercard: 130M Europeans switching to sovereign payment](https://www.lesnumeriques.com/banque-en-ligne/adieu-visa-et-mastercard-130-millions-d-europeens-basculent-vers-un-paiement-100-souverain-des-2026-n250918.html)** — *Hacker News* — Over 130 million Europeans are set to transition to a homegrown sovereign payments network, reducing dependence on US card giants Visa and Mastercard.

- **[Fintech is making credit cards weirder](https://workweek.com/2022/08/05/fintech-is-making-credit-cards-weirder/)** — *Hacker News* — Fintech innovation is driving a new wave of niche, highly specialized credit card products that challenge traditional banking norms.

- **[Warsh to review how Fed works after holding US interest rates at first meeting](https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cdjkl78vd7lo)** — *BBC Business* — New Federal Reserve Chair Kevin Warsh held rates steady at 3.5–3.75% at his first meeting and announced a review of the central bank's internal operations.

---

## 🍁 Top 5 Canadian Fintech News

- **[Wealthsimple launches prediction markets app through US exchange Kalshi](https://betakit.com/wealthsimple-launches-prediction-markets-app-through-us-exchange-kalshi/)** — *BetaKit* — Canadian fintech leader Wealthsimple has launched a prediction markets app in partnership with US-regulated exchange Kalshi, opening a new asset class to Canadian retail investors.

- **[Hot bet summer? Soon Canadians will be able to trade on prediction markets](https://www.cbc.ca/news/business/prediction-markets-wealthsimple-9.7239575?cmp=rss)** — *CBC Business* — CBC explores the arrival of prediction markets for Canadian consumers, with Wealthsimple leading the charge into this emerging and controversial financial product.

- **[How IDMTC and SR&ED can help Canadian tech companies stretch their R&D budgets](https://betakit.com/how-idmtc-and-sred-can-help-canadian-tech-companies-stretch-their-rd-budgets/)** — *BetaKit* — A deep dive into how Canadian tech and fintech startups can leverage federal R&D tax incentives like SR&ED and the new IDMTC to extend their runway and fund innovation.

- **[Shopify introduces in-store returns, more updates to agentic commerce](https://betakit.com/shopify-introduces-in-store-returns-more-updates-to-agentic-commerce/)** — *BetaKit* — Shopify continues expanding its commerce platform with in-store returns functionality and new agentic AI commerce features, deepening its embedded payments and retail ecosystem.

- **[Canada calls screen scraping 'unsecure,' sets Open Banking target for 2023](https://finledger.com/2021/08/09/canada-sets-open-banking-target-for-2023/)** — *Hacker News* — *(Evergreen relevance)* Canada's early positioning against screen scraping and its push toward a formal open banking framework remains foundational context as the country's consumer-driven banking regime continues to take shape in 2026.

---

## 🌊 Bonus: Relevant to Atlantic Fintech's Focus (1–3 articles)

- **[New Research Finds Flexible Rent Payments Improved On-Time Payment Rates for Renters](https://financialpost.com/globe-newswire/new-research-finds-flexible-rent-payments-improved-on-time-payment-rates-for-renters)** — *Financial Post* — A study of 488 multifamily properties found that flexible rent payment timing reduced delinquency rates, a finding highly relevant to Atlantic Canada's financial inclusion and payments innovation agenda given the region's significant renter population.

- **[Calgary is now the fastest growing tech ecosystem in Canada](https://betakit.com/calgary-is-now-the-fastest-growing-tech-ecosystem-in-canada/)** — *BetaKit* — Calgary's rapid rise as Canada's fastest-growing tech hub offers both a benchmark and a competitive reminder for Atlantic Canadian ecosystem builders working to attract fintech talent and venture capital to the region.

- **[Open Banking and Payments Competition](https://www.bitsaboutmoney.com/archive/open-banking-and-payments-competition/)** — *Hacker News* — A thoughtful analysis of how open banking frameworks drive payments competition, directly relevant to Atlantic Canada's credit unions and emerging fintechs as Canada's open banking implementation moves forward.
